description: Title Search — conducts grantor/grantee index searches, builds chain of title, identifies encumbrances, and generates title abstracts from recorded documents

hard_stops.label: Parcel Number Not Found
hard_stops.logic: Parcel number does not exist in the assessor/recorder index — cannot perform search on non-existent parcel

hard_stops.label: Index Gap Detected
hard_stops.logic: Gap detected in the grantor/grantee index for the search period — title chain cannot be certified as complete

soft_flags.label: Unreleased Liens Found
soft_flags.logic: One or more liens on the property appear to be satisfied but have no recorded release — may require curative action

soft_flags.label: Probate Conveyance in Chain
soft_flags.logic: Chain of title includes a probate conveyance — verify court order and Letters Testamentary are on file
